prompt: Produce a docs/DATA-MODEL.yaml for this product. Use docs/PRD.yaml (web app 'Acme Tasks' with features F-001 Quick add, F-002 Keyboard navigation) and docs/UX.yaml + docs/UX__dashboard.yaml as inputs. The output should validate against the sdlc-data schema and trace each PRD F-NNN to at least one entity.

assertions.text: Task entity is defined (derivable from PRD features F-001/F-002 and UX dashboard)
Every must_have_feature F-001, F-002 is traced by at least one entity's traces_prd_features
persistence.primary_store is set and is a valid enum value
id_strategy.scheme is set and is a valid enum value
relationships is a list (possibly empty for a simple model)
Each relationship's from_entity and to_entity resolves to a defined entity
validate_schema.py exits 0 on the produced file
